series_metadata.series_description: Documents needed to carry out terms of antitrust settlements and mediation, working with the claims administrator and escrow agent, and the distribution of settlement monies. Records include, but are not limited to, settlement agreements, materials pertaining to the selection of mediator, escrow agent and claims administrator, escrow agreements, claims administration materials, materials pertaining to public notice, reports to demonstrate compliance with terms of agreement.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: settlement agreement reached and case closed. ; Electronic: from when settlement agreement reached, end of consent decree, or judicial extension, provided available applicable audit cycle
